name: Enorama Pharma AB (publ)
summary: Enorama Pharma AB (publ), a pharmaceutical company, develops, manufactures, and sells medicated chewing gum containing proven generic substances in Sweden. It offers nicotine chewing gum for smoking cessation and medical cannabis chewing gums for non-pharma applications, as well as for other applications, such as oromucosal drug delivery and allergic rhinitis. The company is based in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
